text:
#define MASK(len)       ((0xffffffff>>(32-(len)))<<(32-(len)))

	If i position the cursor on the first ``<'' on the above
	line and hit the ``%'' key, the cursor should move to the
	next-to-the-last ``)''.  Instead, it doesn't move (but, it
	beeps at me).

How-To-Repeat: 
	Try it.
